name: Run Detail
description: Detail view for a single task run (/runs/[id]). Uses dynamic(ssr:false) import of RunDetailContent, which fetches GET /api/v1/task-runs/{id}. The routeStub is load-bearing: without it the sentinel 404s and the page shows 'Run not found'. With the stub, the populated view renders an 8-tab layout (Summary through Phase Timeline) plus Back/Refresh buttons. The dynamic import means extraSettleMs is needed for the initial spinner to settle. Ports run-detail.spec.ts populated rendering. Read-only; structural only.

body.prompt: Sentinel task run for spec CI verification

states.name: Populated tab layout
states.description: The 8-tab layout that renders only when run data is present (RunDetailContent.tsx:232-266). The tab triggers (Summary, Findings, Test Results, AI Conversation, Data & Logs, Errors, Decisions, Phase Timeline) are static text rendered exclusively in the populated branch — the error branch shows 'Run not found' with no tabs. Asserting the Summary tab (default active) and Back/Refresh buttons proves the stub resolved and the dynamic import settled.

assertions.description: Summary tab trigger — default active tab, static text, populated-only.
Findings tab trigger — static text, populated-only.
Back button in the populated header (text 'Back', distinct from error state's 'Back to Runs').
Refresh button in the populated header.
